name: Silvers Rayleigh - OP08-118 (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Select up to 2 of your opponent's Characters, and give 1 Character 3000 power and the other 2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
